zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Martell於1367年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Peter Martell22歲，母親Elizabeth Riedel23歲。她於1396年與William Babington在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾爾維爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年2月2日在她的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Martell于1367年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲Peter Martell22岁，母亲Elizabeth Riedel23岁。她于1396年与William Babington在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾爾維爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年2月2日在她的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Martell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: rare southern variant of   Martel   (compare 2 below) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
Catalan: nickname for a forceful person or perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a smith, from martell ‘hammer’ (from Late Latin martellus; see also Martel 1).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Martel  .

variants.name: Mortell
meanings: English (Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of   Martell  .

variants.name: Martel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Andre, Armand, Normand, Marcel, Adrien, Aime, Benoit, Laurent, Yvan, Jacques, Michel.

French and English (Guernsey): nickname for a forceful person or perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a smith, from Old French martel ‘hammer’ (also recorded in late Middle English), from Late Latin martellus. The reference may be to the martel de fer, the iron hammer or mace of medieval warfare, as had been the case with Charles Martel, the grandfather of Charlemagne, who gained his byname from the force with which he struck down his enemies, the Saracens, in the battle of Tours (Poitiers) in 732.
English (Guernsey): from the Middle English and Old French personal name Martel, a pet form of Martin .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Martell was born in 1367, in Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Peter Martell, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth Riedel, was 23. She married William Babington in 1396, in Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 2 February 1442, in her hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Martell est née en 1367, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Martell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Riedel, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Babington en 1396, à Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1442, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Martell 1367 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Martell 22 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Riedel 23. Sie hat 1396 in Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom William Babington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1442 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Martell è nata il nel 1367 nel Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Peter Martell, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Riedel, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Babington nel 1396, nel Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 2 febbraio 1442, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Martellが1367年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Peter Martellは22歳，母Elizabeth Riedelは23歳であった。1396年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアチルウエルでWilliam Babingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年2月2日に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Martell(이)가 1367년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Martell(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Riedel(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 치웰에서 William Babington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 2월 2일 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Martell nasceu em 1367, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter Martell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Riedel, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Babington em 1396, em Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1442, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Martell родилась в 1367 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter Martell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Riedel, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Babington в 1396 г. в местности чилвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 2 февраля 1442 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Martell nació en 1367, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter Martell, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Riedel, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William Babington en 1396, en Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1442, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
